title: 3D Print 10 Benchies
description: Put your 3D printer to the test! To complete this quest, print at least 10 Benchies.

dialogue.text: Phoenix on deck. Ten Benchies is not just grind; we use this run to prove repeatable quality under real production conditions.
Pick a strategy: run one validated slicer profile for consistency, or trial two profiles to compare finish versus speed. Either path must produce printed evidence.

options.text: Use one stable profile for all ten.
Compare two slicer profiles before committing.

dialogue.text: Print in batches and inspect each hull for layer shift, elephant's foot, and stringing. Pause and correct immediately when defects repeat.

options.text: A defect pattern is repeating; stop and diagnose.

dialogue.text: Run profile A on five Benchies and profile B on five. Keep the better profile only if it reduces defects without slowing too much.

options.text: Comparison complete and ten Benchies are ready.

dialogue.text: Recovery drill: dry filament, clean nozzle, and re-level bed before resuming. Print one confirmation Benchy first; if it still fails, repeat corrective cycle.

options.text: Corrective cycle done; resume production plan.

dialogue.text: Final gate: count ten physical Benchies and confirm defect notes were reviewed. No evidence, no fleet completion.

options.text: Fleet count and quality review are complete.

dialogue.text: Fleet approved. You now have repeatable print discipline, not just a shelf of boats.
